name: Red Snapper Fillets in Artichoke Butter Microwave
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces artichoke hearts, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the fillets dry with paper towels and place them on a flat baking dish.
2. In a 4-cup measuring cup, sauté butter, onion tops, parsley, and garlic using the microwave on High for 2 minutes.
3. Add lemon juice, mushrooms, artichokes, salt, and cayenne pepper to the mixture. Microwave on High for an additional 2 minutes or until heated.
4. Pour the mixture over the fish fillets.
5. Cover with waxed paper and cook in the microwave for 7 to 8 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork. Let stand covered for 3 minutes.
Serves 6.
Note: Allow 3 minutes of cooking time per pound of fish at room temperature.
